channel.title: Seattle Beer Week
channel.description: Upcoming events for Seattle Beer Week

item.title: SBW KICK OFF!!
item.description:
Friday, May 9, 2025 at 4 PM

Location: Location ID: m729rvb6

Join us for the official kick off of Seattle Beer Week with a ceremonial tapping of Group Project Helles Lager! The official tapping will be at 5pm!

item.title: FRYday Night!
item.description:
Friday, May 9, 2025 at 4 PM

Location: Location ID: m729srp9

FRY-nally. An event you can put ketchup on! It’s FRYday Night… and we’re kicking off the weekend AND Seattle Beer Week with FREE Fries for the first 100 people who buy a pint of the official beer of Seattle Beer Week! Even better, Plus, FREE SBW T-Shirt Giveaways, Live Music, FREE Treats, Special Appearances and more!

item.title: Spring Beer Fest
item.description:
Friday, May 9, 2025 at 4:01 PM

Location: Location ID: mabn0quq

This mini beer festival celebrates our new spring seasonal releases, as well as a kind of retrospective on some of our favorite releases of the last couple of months. All rounded out with some great guest taps from a bunch of great local producers and friends.Our Spring Beer Fest will include 12 cask ales, including our Spring seasonal favorite Stinging Nettle Ale and a new version of an old Machine House classic, Oyster Stout. We will also have casks of our collaboration beers with Fast Fashion, Greyscale Brewing and Lowercase (the last ever cask of London Pilsner!).Plus several excellent guest beers from Structures Brewing, Human People, E9, Bizarre Brewing, and ciders from Alpenfire, Woodinville and Yonder to round out our selection.Come on by throughout the weekend to sample through everything.Spring Beer Fest is May 9-11 at Machine House in Hillman City. Perfect timing for Seattle Beer Week, and Mothers Day! This event is free to enter and open to all ages.

item.title: SEATTLE CASK-O-RAMA!
item.description:
Friday, May 9, 2025 at 5 PM

Location: Location ID: m9tf324k

TEN Seattle breweries, TEN casks on the bartop!

item.title: Cheese & Beer Pairing Class
item.description:
Friday, May 9, 2025 at 7:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m9teoquw

Come learn about the similarities and differences between two famous fermented foods -- beer and cheese -- while we lead you through a guided tasting of 4 Outer Planet beers paired with 4 artisanal cheeses from Street Cheese!

item.title: Yoga & Pints
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 10:45 AM

Location: Location ID: maag8sg7

All-levels yoga practice led by local yogi Sarah Hager. $25 includes class + a pint or N/A Beverage.Date: May 10, 2025

item.title: Haze Fest
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 11 AM

Location: Location ID: m992rk4x

A celebration of hazy beers that will include several new releases, some old favorites, and quite a few fun, one-off, draft-only infusions. Overall we'll have more than 16 hazy beers on tap, with many available in cans to-go. Live music by The Prospectors in the beer garden from 5 -7:00pm.

item.title: Dirty Couch Brewing Anniversary Party
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5g4qym

Dirty Couch Brewing is celebrating our 10th anniversary and kicking off Seattle Beer Week! Come to celebrate with us at our Magnolia taproom on May 10. We will have new releases, a pig roast, and live music from our friends, Grunge Tree.Festivities happening all day with food starting around 3 pm and music at 6:30 pm.Dirty Couch Brewing is family and dog-friendly brewery specializing in unique barrel aged sours, while crafting more classic beer styles. We have a beer for every palate!

item.title: Flying Bike Coop Member for a Day
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 1 PM

Location: Location ID: m9n0qquy

Ever wondered what it’s like to be part of a beer-loving, community-powered co-op? Now’s your chance to find out.Join us for Flying Bike Co-op Member for a Day — an exclusive event where you get a taste of what it's like to own a part of Washington's first co-op brewery. Whether you’re a die-hard hop head or just co-op curious, this is your opportunity to sip, socialize, and see what membership is all about — no commitment required.Expect fresh pours, good vibes, and even better beerSaturday 5/10 and Tuesday 5/13Come thirsty, leave inspired — and maybe even as our newest co-op member. Cheers to community, craft, and cold ones!

item.title: Free Brewery Tours
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 2 PM

Location: Location ID: m9teoquw

Join us for guided tasting flights and free brewery tours, all day on Saturday, May 10th!

item.title: DJs All Day
item.description:
Saturday, May 10, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5g8yhv

DJ Dance Party 3-9pm . Free Entry

item.title: Queen of Queens Release Party
item.description:
Sunday, May 11, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: maag8sg7

Our hazy collab with Queen Anne Beer Hall is back! Grab a pint & try Smashbox's limited Queen of Queens wing special. Buy a beer, wings, or a 4-pack and you're entered to win a $100 GN gift card.

item.title: Kalt Following: Ceremony of Lager
item.description:
Sunday, May 11, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: ma2k8pe0

Kalt Following is our bi-annual lager fest we throw to celebrate all things lager! We’ll be pouring beers from breweries near and far and will feature 3 gravity kegs on the bar top. Woodshop BBQ will be at the brewery during the event as well!

item.title: Mother's Day Drag Brunch
item.description:
Sunday, May 11, 2025 at 12:30 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5ggh49

Celebrate the Queens in your life with beer, mimosas and Drag! The event featurs beermosas, micheladas, and lots of drag. Come at Noon to grab something to sip and snack on. Show starts at 1:00pm and is sure to make your mom or any other queen in your life feel appreciated.https://www.eventbrite.com/e/mothers-day-drag-brunch-tickets-1316628704899?aff=oddtdtcreator

item.title: STOUPer Spa Day for Moms
item.description:
Sunday, May 11, 2025 at 1 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5gl0d4

Mom's don't want another coffee mug- they want to relax! Let mom escape upstairs at Stoup for some beauty & beer! She'll receive special treats, can sign up for special services, enjoy deals on beer, wine and other drinks all while being treated like the super special person they are!. Botox and B12 shots must be booked in advance.Special gift to those who RSVP HEREhttps://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScRHz4BHHP_jeLDa8kB1TZQfFCDKlUTGhNAMWsURrzp5cmjMw/viewform

item.title: Tours & Pours
item.description:
Sunday, May 11, 2025 at 3:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m8xdo4wc

Join us for a behind-the-scenes tour of the Ladd & Lass brewery with head brewer and the ladd himself, Nick Ladd! Geek out about fermentation, learn more about L&L, and enjoy special tank pours along the way.The complimentary tours start at 3:30pm and 5:30pm and are limited to (12) people. Get to the taproom early to snag a spot.

item.title: Mai Tai Monday with Cloudburst Brewing
item.description:
Monday, May 12, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: m7279q0m

Cue the tiny umbrellas & the Surf Rock! Lets drink some cold beers by the tiki bar and of course some Mai Tais with the gang from Cloudburst Brewing. We'll have beer garden games & spam pizza too.

item.title: This Is Washington Dammit!
item.description:
Monday, May 12, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: m9tf324k

Thirty Washington beers from 30 breweries! All $5 PINTS! All day, All night!Plus, Zeeks is offering 25% off pizzas delivered to BPP!

item.title: Movie Night Mayhem - "Friendship"
item.description:
Monday, May 12, 2025 at 5:28 PM

Location: Location ID: m992z2fo

What: Bale Breaker + The Beer Authority + Watershed Pub brewed a collab West Coast IPA for a movie night pub crawl to see A24's new film, Friendship. Tim Robinson + Paul Rudd + male friendship. 93% on Rotten Tomatoes.When: Mon 5/124pm "Happy Hour" at The Beer Authority5:30 Beer + Pizza at The Watershed Pub7:05 Movie (1 hr 40 mins)9:00(ish) Post Movie hang at The 5th Avenue TavernCost: $10 for movie ticket only. $30 "Best Friend VIP" gets you 1 tix + "unlimited" collab beer + pizza on the Shed mezzanine. Email kelsey@watershedpub.com for reservations.Plus! "Friendship" bracelet making session(s) at the Beer Authority??

item.title: SBW Themed Trivia
item.description:
Monday, May 12, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: maag8sg7

Our weekly installation of Head in the Clouds Trivia with an SBW twist! Join us for beer-centric questions and GN lore. Prizes, bragging rights and brews await.

item.title: Seattle Ladies Choir
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 8:05 AM

Location: Location ID: m992rk4x

Drink for a good cause: Reuben's Brew is donating $1 per pint sold to our nonprofit - ALL DAY! We'll be there from 5 PM to 9 PM - join us to connect and support both the music and local brewery communities.

item.title: Around the World in Aslan Beers
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: ma6uwa2i

Drink Aslan beers inspired by styles from around the world! Czech Republic: Mlíko and Šnyt pilsner poursMexico: Micheladas Germany: Berliner Weisse with woodruff syrup England: Gravity Keg of English Brown Ale Belgium: Brett Saison

item.title: Flying Bike Coop Member for a Day
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 1 PM

Location: Location ID: m9n0qquy

Ever wondered what it’s like to be part of a beer-loving, community-powered co-op? Now’s your chance to find out.Join us for Flying Bike Co-op Member for a Day — an exclusive event where you get a taste of what it's like to own a part of Washington's first co-op brewery. Whether you’re a die-hard hop head or just co-op curious, this is your opportunity to sip, socialize, and see what membership is all about — no commitment required.Expect fresh pours, good vibes, and even better beerSaturday 5/10 and Tuesday 5/13Come thirsty, leave inspired — and maybe even as our newest co-op member. Cheers to community, craft, and cold ones!

item.title: Limited Brett Beer Release
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 2 PM

Location: Location ID: ma6uptev

We're tapping a single keg of our 6th Leg Black Saison (brewed in 2022 for our 6th anniversary) that was barrel aged with Brettanomyces!

item.title: aSAULT of the Senses
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: m9x0skmu

Food, Drink, & Music Pairing. Five course meal, each paired with a beer or beer cocktail, as well as a selection of music from SAULT mixed by DJ ABV. https://ladyjaye.com/bbq-catering-seattle/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2CgBleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFJeXd0elRXa2tZQlMwN2piAR5w--TOnmERpi16lNVl46kNzWLwlTN8qMAPne-zTXZ5vlvhpQCERlIO0pWV-Q_aem_9fdNuWSnpanVz6lE8LRuiQ

item.title: PAPER AIRPLANE CONTEST!
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: m9tf324k

You get to make three paper airplanes to compete in three categories: accuracy, landing, & free-style! Enjoy great beer and win prizes from New Belgium and Sierra Nevada!

item.title: SBW Themed Trivia
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: Location ID: maagwt8v

Another round of SBW themed trivia, this time at Georgetown! Did you know that you can go to Head in the Clouds trivia at both of our locations and the questions will be fresh and new each time? Georgetown events are 21+

item.title: Gate City IPA Trivia Night
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: m992z2fo

Join us for this Seattle Beer Week 16 event! Two rounds of trivia at 7pm and 8pm and delicious hazy IPA for a great cause. Free to play. CALL AHEAD TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT - 206.729.7433With every pint and pitcher sold, a donation is made to North Helpline, helping to keep food on the table and a roof overhead for our neighbors. Drinking a great IPA counts as a good deed for the day!About Gate City Community Benefit:Hellbent Brewing, Watershed Pub & Kitchen, Project 9 Brewing, and local community partners have come together again to organize the 8th annual Seattle Beer Week event that features Hellbent Brewing’s award-winning Gate City IPA. A combination of the two Seattle neighborhoods, Northgate and Lake City, this brew celebrates the North Seattle community by raising funds for North Helpline.Meet with North Helpline staff, win fun prizes, and enjoy Gate City IPA throughout Seattle Beer Week! Stay tuned for more details.

item.title: Urban Family Hopvine Trivia
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 7:30 PM

Location: Location ID: macmzzav

We're tapping the Urban Family Beer Week Group Project German Style Lager for our ever popular Hopvine Trivia night with Head in the Clouds Trivia. Drink great beer, do beer trivia, and win beer prizes!

item.title: 1st Annual Latona Brewer's Spelling Bee
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 7:30 PM

Location: Location ID: ma0kydm5

8 Brewers are facing off in an orthographic smackdown of epicproportions hosted by our Latona's Matt Carter and legendary Seattle brewer Kevin Forhan! Come watch some of Seattle's best test their mettle against a barrage of brewers terms! Participants: Theo Muller (Urban FamilyRobyn Schumacher (Stoup) Katherine Gooding (Flying Bike)Tom Furey (Halcyon) Leslie Shore (Cold Stream Malt)Roy McLaughlin (Big Time)Barry Chan (Lucky Envelope)Nick Ladd (Ladd & Lass)

item.title: 12 Pack at the Troll
item.description:
Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 11 PM

Location: Location ID: maahdoeu

SBW's shortest event. If you know, you know.Be respectful of the neighbors.

item.title: Flight Night
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 11:30 AM

Location: Location ID: ma6uptev

Get $5 off flights all day!

item.title: Brewer's Day at the Ballpark!
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 11:30 AM

Location: Location ID: m9n19fam

Be Among the First to Experience The Hall on Occidental!Lunch & Beers at The Hall on Occidental – 11:30 AMMariners vs. Yankees at T-Mobile Park – Game starts at 1:10 PMWednesday, May 14 Tickets: $50 (Includes lunch, beer, and game ticket)We only have 50 tickets—grab yours now before they sell out!Buy your tickets here --https://www.exploretock.com/queen-anne-beerhall-seattle/event/547066/brewers-day-at-the-ballpark

item.title: Flight Night
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: ma6uouly

Get $5 off flights all night long!

item.title: Little League Home Run Release Party
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 3:45 PM

Location: Location ID: mamnsypg

Metier / Fast Fashion Collab release party!

item.title: 5th Annual SBW CORNHOLE SHOWDOWN
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: m9iqgaee

Join your friends and coworkers here for a raucous, good time WED 5/14. 6-11pm. If you were here last year...well, you know you had fun. Our 60 taps (and clean lines) are focused on Seattle & WA-based breweries and cider makers; typically you can expect 42 local kegs on tap and others waiting on deck (chances are draft from your favorite Seattle breweries). Free live music 7-9pm, good food and the annual, double elimination, SBW Corn Hole Tournament that starts off friendly enough ~ then tends to get serious. How it works is a Rep/Owner/Brewer from each brewery on hand is paired with a non-beer-biz person. Swag prizes abound. We have a lot of space and lots of boards, so typically everybody gets to play. But if you 100% want to play, show up closer to 5pm (and/or email Kelly@theGrowlerGuys.com).So, come throw some bags, drink some great Seattle-based beer, chum up with industry friends you may already know, and just hang out for a few hours with other craft-loving guests. It's an Open Party. Feel free to invite coworkers & friends. Great beer, food, corn hole, live music, parking ~ I feel an Underberg coming on...

item.title: Flying Bike Mission Impossible Scavenger Hunt
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m9n0qquy

Flying Bike Brewery Presents Top Secret. Undercover. Scavenger Hunt. Calling all agents! Your next assignment is here...should you choose to accept it. Join us Wednesday May 14th at Flying Bike Brewery for a Mission: Impossible Scavenger Hunt Run.

item.title: Pints with Pauly
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: Location ID: maagwt8v

Head to our Georgetown taproom and hang with Great Notion Founder Paul and chat all things Great Notion. We're also tapping a surprise BBA from last year's Time Keeper's series!

item.title: Flying Bike Run Club Scavenger Hunt
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m9n0qquy

Lace up your sneakers and grab your beer-loving buddies — it’s time to hit the streets for the Flying Bike's Run Club Scavenger Hunt during Seattle Beer Week!Join us for a one-of-a-kind running adventure where fitness meets fun, and craft beer is the ultimate prize. You'll be given a list of tasks to complete as you explore the neighborhood — all at your own pace. Run, jog, or walk… just don’t miss out!Post-run beers at Flying Bike — you’ve earned it!

item.title: BrewBQ with Ladd and Lass. Burgers, Beer and Live Music
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: ma8jnb90

Enjoy an evening with our friends at Ladd and Lass. There will be burgers on the grill, some amazing beer on tap and live music with Neil O'Connell

item.title: Industry Party
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5gl0d4

Seattle's Beer Industry is invited to join us for Karaoke, Tarot Card Readings and $5 pints all night! Let's celebrate our awesome beer scene together!

item.title: Beer Trivia!
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: m9teoquw

Join us for a free trivia night about local (and not local) beer! Prizes for teams in 1st, 2nd and last place.

item.title: Underburg Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 8 PM

Location: Location ID: macmzzav

Underburg is hosting the longest running open mic on Capitol Hill! Come on in to listen to local artists share their musical passion AND drink Underburg with $1off!

item.title: Cask Night + $6 Thursday
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: ma6uouly

We'll be tapping a cask of our Smith Cove ESB with Earl Gray tea on $6 Thursday. Get a pint of real ale for just $6 and pair it with a smoked bratwurst for just $6 more!

item.title: Pints with Pauly
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 4 PM

Location: Location ID: maag8sg7

Don’t miss out on your second chance to kick it with Great Notion Founder and CEO, Paul! We’ll be pouring fan favorite brew Mosca Michelada for the first time this season alongside a garnish bar with all the traditional and not-so-traditional toppings.

item.title: Bulgogi Sub Night
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 5 PM

Location: Location ID: mafjbnxb

$5 Bulgogi Sub with purchase of a pint

item.title: FREE Axe Throwing!
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 5:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m729srp9

Special for Seattle Beer Week, come throw some Axes at Ounces! Tomahawk Axe will be here with their mobile Axe Throwing trailer! So stop by, have a pint of the official SBW Beer and throw some axes! Full details here at:https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/events/axe-throwing

item.title: Pig & Pint Night at Rhein Haus
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 5:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m9n10ckq

It's time to swine & dine! Join us at Rhein Haus starting at 5:30pm and be ready to indulge in a plate overflowing with slow-roasted pork, alongside all your favorite Haus-made fixin's—mac & cheese, coleslaw, and honey butter brioche rolls. And what's a feast without beer? Your meal includes a pint of beer from Icicle Brewing—all for just $30. Featuring live music by DJ Krescendo and a Stein Holding competition on the patio. Meet the brewers, win some cool swag, score some Mariners tickets. See you there for some serious swine dining!

item.title: DJ Night with BA Barleywine
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: mao31ck3

DJ Night with BA Barleywine

item.title: Brewsters Arm Wrestling
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: mamu0ghy

Meet women in brewing and then arm wrestle!

item.title: Hotdog Day Afternoon Beer Release and Hot Dog Eating Competition
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m9stfl7e

Join us as we release our collaboration, "Hotdog Day Afternoon" lager with Ilk beer from Olympia. In tandem with the release, we are hosting a hotdog eating competition relay style. More details to follow.

item.title: 2nd Annual Brewer's Night Wing Competition
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 7 PM

Location: Location ID: m729u6gg

15 of your favorite local breweries compete for the title and a spot on our menu! Come be a part of the action. Your ticket includes a chicken wing and a 4oz beer pairing from every brewery. Be there and cast your vote!Tickets are $25 (online or at the door)You'll get --60oz of beer (3.5 beers!)15 wingsbragging rights that you were there!

item.title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe Tournament with Vice Brewing
item.description:
Thursday, May 15, 2025 at 8 PM

Location: Location ID: ma0kydm5

Mario Kart is back for a special edition! We've teamed up with our pals at Vice Brewing who are bringing some of their best beers to the Latona for Seattle Beer Week! If you've been to one of our tournaments before, you know how fun they are. If you haven't, its a good chance to drink some great local craft beer, eat some delish comfort food, meet some new people, and win some prizes! We'll be pre-registering up to 32 racers for our single elimination tournament, so slide into our Instagram DM's (@thelatonapub) to enter!

item.title: Rice Lager Weekend
item.description:
Friday, May 16, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5grs85

Want wind down your beer week with a few days of Japanese rice lagers, city pop music, and classic Japanese cult movies, we got you covered! We’ll be putting 8 different rice lagers on tap all weekend. Featuring Obelisk, Ladd & Lass, Lucky Envelope, Asahi, and more!!

item.title: BODACIOUS BEVERAGES!
item.description:
Friday, May 16, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: m9tf324k

Twenty rare & unusual beers from around the world! Barrel-aged brews, sour beers, hoppy stuff, and more! Taster trays & designated drivers encouraged!

item.title: Beer, Burlesque & More
item.description:
Friday, May 16, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5ggh49

Hosted by Rowan Ruthless and featuring @rubymimosa, @therockabillybarbie,, @pwillowburlesque, @genuineporcelain& Peaches & Tease, our delightfully naughty sour!Tickets available here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/beerlesque-tickets-1342874326259?aff=oddtdtcreator

item.title: Sour Hour! Urban Family Brewing's Comedy night!
item.description:
Friday, May 16, 2025 at 7:30 PM

Location: Location ID: m729rvb6

Join us for an hour(ish) of comedy hosted by Annie Sutherland in our production space! Tickets available at UrbanFamilyBrewing.com

item.title: Metier Brewing hosts Encore Music Showcase
item.description:
Friday, May 16, 2025 at 8 PM

Location: Location ID: macmzzav

Each month our magical Encore Music Showcase features local musical artists from our beloved Hopvine Open Mic. This month Metier Brewing Company is hosting with 3 delicious beers on tap and fun swag giveaways. You extra extra don't want to miss this event!

item.title: Tour De Pints
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 11 AM

Location: Location ID: m9n0qquy

The Tour de Pints is an annual bike ride throughout Seattle to visit a bunch of breweries and drink a bunch of beer! Can't beat that!The full route has not been announced yet, but you can expect somewhere around 25 miles of bike path, bike lane, and safe road riding that will take you to approximately five breweries. The route will end in Ballard, not too far from the start point. The ride is unsupported, but there will be plenty of food options around to keep you fueled up along the way.At each stop, there will be raffles for prizes, as if you need an excuse to ride bikes and drink beers!The event is totally free to attend, though donations are accepted by purchasing a donation ticket. No purchase required. Drinking beer is not required, or even advisable. Know your limits!The route will be revealed as the event draws nearer!RSVP Here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/tour-de-pints-2025-tickets-1317605195609

item.title: Paint & Sip
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 11 AM

Location: Location ID: ma5g8yhv

Paint and Sip. Fee includes all your paint supplies. Beverages not included but discounted for event

item.title: Pints with a Purpose
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: maagwt8v

Close out Seattle Beer week at our Georgetown location to get your drink and your altruism on. We'll have a selection of awesome beers with $1 form each purchase being donated to Saving Great Animals dog rescue.

item.title: Pints with a Purpose
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: Location ID: maag8sg7

Close out Seattle Beer week at our Ballard location to get your drink and your altruism on. We'll have a selection of awesome beers with $1 form each purchase being donated to the Ballard Food Bank.

item.title: Pet-a-Pup!
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 2 PM

Location: Location ID: m729srp9

Come snuggle some adorable German Shepherd Puppies and find out how you can take one home! Special for Seattle Beer Week, we've partnered with the Washington German Shepherd Rescue for a special adoption event to help find local German Shepherd Puppies their forever homes! Stop by to pet a puppy AND sip a pint of the official SBW Beer while you are at it!Details here: https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/events/pet-a-pup

item.title: Charcuterie Workshop
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: ma5g4qym

Come join us for a hands-on workshopwhere you'll learn how to makecharcuterie creations while sippingDirty Couch Brewing beer!Please buy tickets (55$) in advance: https://www.eventbrite.com/o/boards-by-erica-104721276261

item.title: Matchless Matchbox Happy Hour
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: ma0kydm5

Drink some of Tumwater's finest craft beer and race your friends on a custom Matchbox track! (Cars will be provided, but feel free to bring your own!

item.title: Pine Box Beer Can Derby
item.description:
Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 3 PM

Location: Location ID: m7279q0m

The race is on! Come & try your luck racing cans cub scout style down the tracks to beer glory. Join us at 3pm to purchase a beer, canned of course, & a race kit. We’ll race in heats starting at 5pm w/ prizes for 1st, 2nd, & 3rd + most attractive car! Tools will be provided. Cub scout gear encouraged! See you at the starting line.3pm to 5pm - Build Time 5pm - RACE TIME!!ALL CARS MUST PASS INSPECTION TO QUALIFY FOR THE RACE Following are the inspection points 1. The can weight shall not exceed 5.0 ounces. The official race scale shall be considered final. 2. The overall length of the can shall not exceed 7 inches. 3. The overall width of the can shall not exceed 2 ¾ inches. 4. The can must have 1 ¾” clearance between the wheels. 5. The can must have 3/8” clearance underneath the body. 6. The can may be shaped any way that is desired. 7. The can must be freewheeling, with no starting devices. 8. You must use official Pine Box Wheels and Axles, YOUR CAN CAR MUST BE BUILT ON SITE.Each can must pass inspection by the official inspection committee before it will be allowed to compete. The Inspection Committee has the responsibility to disqualify those cans that do not meet these specifications.Hosted by New Belgium Brewing
